unlockRequirements.description: Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Selene Jean.
Reach the rank of Merchant or higher.
Provide 50T of Lavian Brandy — a rare commodity purchased at Lave Station in Lave.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Selene Jean.
Reach friendly reputation with Alliance and allied with Alioth Independents for the Alioth system permit.
Provide 50T of Bromellite.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Hera Tani.
When you reach Competent or higher combat rank.
Provide 50T of Fujin Tea — obtain this from Futen Spaceport at Fujin.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Juri Ishmaak.
Gain rank Midshipman or higher with the Federal Navy.
Provide 50 units of Aberrant Shield Pattern Analysis.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Elvira Martuuk.
By invitation from the Party of Yoru — take missions for the Party of Yoru (Yoru system) until friendly status, then complete the special invitation mission.
Provide 25T of Xihe Biomorphic Companions — obtain these at Zhen Dock station in Xihe.
Revealed by default.
Take missions for or trade with Eurybia Blue Mafia in the Eurybia system until you reach a Cordial state with the faction.
Provide 200T of Landmines, which can only be bought at planetary bases.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Liz Ryder.
Reach an Imperial Navy rank of Outsider or higher.
Provide 50T of Kamitra Cigars — obtain these at Hammel Terminal in Kamitra.

name: Felicity Farseer
description: Frame Shift Drives, thrusters, scanners and sensors

unlockRequirements.description: Revealed by default.
Reach the rank of Scout in Exploration.
Provide 1T of Meta-Alloys — obtain from Darnielle's Progress planetary base in Maia or Thargoid barnacle sites.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Lei Cheung.
Gain exploration rank Surveyor or higher.
Provide 50 units of Classified Scan Databanks.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with The Dweller.
When you have bought or sold goods at fifty different stations.
Provide 200T of gold, which can be bought or mined.
Reach level 3 and 33% with Tod McQuinn.
Gain combat rank Expert or higher.
Provide 200 units of Progenitor Cells.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Juri Ishmaak.
Reach friendly reputation with the Federation.
Provide 1M Credits worth of Combat Bonds.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with The Dweller.
Gain exploration rank Surveyor or higher.
Mine 10T of Osmium.

name: Elvira Martuuk
description: Frame Shift Drives, thrusters and shields

unlockRequirements.description: Revealed by default.
Travel at least 300 Ly away from your start system.
Provide 3T of Soontill Relics — obtain at Cheranovsky City station in Ngurii.
Revealed by default.
You must do business at at least five black markets before he will see you.
500K Credits donation.
Reach level 3 and 33% with Elvira Martuuk.
By invitation from the Sirius Corporation — take missions for Sirius Corporation (Sirius system) until friendly status, then complete the special invitation mission.
Provide 25T of Modular Terminals — obtain from missions.
Reach level 3 and 33% with Tod McQuinn.
When you have mined 500T or more.
Provide 10T of Painite — this can only be obtained from mining.
Reach level 3 at 33% reputation with Marco Qwent.
When you have visited a system at least 5,000 Ly from your original start system.
Provide 25 units of Sensor Fragments — found at crashed Thargoid ships. Shoot the Thargoid Sensors so they shatter, then collect the fragments (3 per shard).
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Marco Qwent.
Gain combat rank Dangerous or higher.
Provide 25T of Kongga Ale.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Felicity Farseer.
When you have earned more than fifty combat bonds.
Provide 1M Credits worth of combat bonds.
Revealed by default.
Hand in fifteen or more bounties.
Bring him 100K Credits worth of bounty vouchers.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Hera Tani.
Reach friendly reputation with the Empire.
Provide 50 units of Decoded Emission Data.

name: Mel Brandon
description: Laser weapons, shields, Frame Shift Drives and thrusters

unlockRequirements.description: Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Elvira Martuuk.
By invitation from the Colonia Council — take missions for the Colonia Council (Colonia system) until friendly status, then complete the special invitation mission.
Provide 100,000 credits worth of bounty vouchers.

name: Etienne Dorn
description: Plasma Accelerators, Rail Guns, Scanners and core modules

unlockRequirements.description: Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Liz Ryder.
Gain trade rank Dealer or higher.
Provide 25 units of Occupied Escape Pods.
Reach level 3 and 33% reputation with Marco Qwent.
When you have visited a system at least 5,000 Ly from your original start system.
Provide 25 units of Sensor Fragments — found at crashed Thargoid ships. Shoot the Thargoid Sensors so they shatter, then collect the fragments (3 per shard).
Complete 10 Restore or Reactivation On Foot missions.
Travel 100 light-years in Apex Interstellar Transport shuttles.
Complete 10 low threat Conflict Zones.
Provide Domino Green with 5 units of Push to learn about Kit Fowler.
Sell 5 Opinion Polls to Bartenders.
Provide Hero Ferrari with 5 units of Settlement Defence Plans to learn about Wellington Beck.
Sell 15 total units of Classic Entertainment, Multimedia Entertainment, and/or Cat Media to Bartenders.
Provide Jude Navarro with 5 units of Genetic Repair Meds to learn about Terra Velasquez.
Complete 6 Covert Heist and Covert Theft On Foot missions.
Provide Wellington Beck with 5 units of InSight Entertainment Suites to learn about Uma Laszlo.
Reach Unfriendly reputation or lower with Sirius Corporation.
Provide Terra Velasquez with 15 units of Financial Projections to learn about Oden Geiger.
Sell 20 total units of Biological Sample, Employee Genetic Data, and/or Genetic Research to Bartenders.
Provide Kit Fowler with 5 units of Surveillance Equipment to learn about Yarden Bond.
Sell 5 Smear Campaign Plans to Bartenders.
Reach Friendly reputation with the Colonia Council.
Dock and disembark at 5 settlements in the Colonia system.
Sell a total of 10 Culinary Recipes or Cocktail Recipes to stations in Colonia.
Provide Baltanos with 10 Faction Associates, Rosa Dayette with 10 Manufacturing Instructions, or Eleanor Bresa with 10 Digital Designs to learn about Yi Shen.
Complete all referral tasks: Provide Baltanos with 10 Faction Associates, Rosa Dayette with 10 Manufacturing Instructions, and Eleanor Bresa with 10 Digital Designs.
